validation.after_or_equal: The :field field must be after or equal to :date.
validation.alpha: The :field field may only contain letters.
validation.alpha_dash: The :field field may only contain letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores.
validation.alpha_num: The :field field may only contain letters and numbers.
validation.array: The :field field must be an array.
validation.assoc: The :field field must be an associative array.
validation.before_or_equal: The :field field must be before or equal to :date.
validation.between: The :field field must be between :min and :max.
validation.boolean: The :field field must be true or false.
validation.confirmed: The :field field confirmation does not match.
validation.contains: The :field field must contain one of: :values.
validation.count: The :field field must contain exactly :count items.
validation.date: The :field field must be a valid date.
validation.date_format: The :field field must match the format :format.
validation.decimal: The :field field must have between :min and :max decimal places.
validation.different: The :field field must be different from :other.
validation.digits_between: The :field field must be between :min and :max digits.
validation.dimensions: The :field field must be an image with dimensions :width x :height.
validation.distinct: The :field field must not contain duplicate values.
validation.email: The :field field must be a valid email address.
validation.ends_with: The :field field must end with one of: :values.
validation.extensions: The :field field must have one of these extensions: :extensions.
validation.file: The :field field must be a valid file.
validation.file_size: The :field field must be exactly :size bytes.
validation.gt: The :field field must be greater than :value.
validation.gte: The :field field must be greater than or equal to :value.
validation.image: The :field field must be an image.
validation.in: The selected :field value is invalid. Allowed values: :values.
validation.integer: The :field field must be an integer.
validation.ip: The :field field must be a valid IP address.
validation.ipv4: The :field field must be a valid IPv4 address.
validation.ipv6: The :field field must be a valid IPv6 address.
validation.json: The :field field must be valid JSON.
validation.list: The :field field must be a list.
validation.lt: The :field field must be less than :value.
validation.lte: The :field field must be less than or equal to :value.
validation.max: The :field field must be at most :max.
validation.max_file_size: The :field field must be at most :max bytes.
validation.max_items: The :field field must contain at most :max items.
validation.min: The :field field must be at least :min.
validation.min_file_size: The :field field must be at least :min bytes.
validation.min_items: The :field field must contain at least :min items.
validation.mimes: The :field field must have one of these MIME types or extensions: :mimes.
validation.not_in: The selected :field value is invalid. Disallowed values: :values.
validation.numeric: The :field field must be a number.
validation.required_array_keys: The :field field must contain these keys: :keys.
validation.starts_with: The :field field must start with one of: :values.
validation.string: The :field field must be a string.
validation.url: The :field field must be a valid URL.
validation.uuid: The :field field must be a valid UUID.
